info.title: ScrapeBadger Zillow API
info.description: Dedicated Zillow scraping API for searching for-sale / for-rent / sold listings, fetching maximal property detail (resoFacts home facts, price/tax/Zestimate history, schools, agent attribution, mortgage rates, photos), agent profiles (reviews, past sales, licenses), region/address autocomplete, and coverage reference data.

get.description: Search Zillow for for-sale / for-rent / sold listings with rich filters.

parameters.name: location
parameters.description: City/state, ZIP, address, or neighborhood (e.g. 'Austin, TX').

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number. Zillow caps search at 20 pages (~820 results).

parameters.name: lot_min
parameters.description: Minimum lot size in square feet.

parameters.name: lot_max
parameters.description: Maximum lot size in square feet.

parameters.name: north
parameters.description: North latitude of a map-bounds box (tile past the 820-result cap).

parameters.name: south
parameters.description: South latitude of a map-bounds box.

parameters.name: east
parameters.description: East longitude of a map-bounds box.

parameters.name: west
parameters.description: West longitude of a map-bounds box.

get.description: Get a single Zillow property's full detail by its zpid.
Get a Zillow real-estate professional's profile, reviews, past sales, and active listings. Provide either username or url.
Resolve a partial search term to Zillow regions/addresses (regionId, lat/lng).

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Partial location — city, ZIP, address, or neighborhood.

get.description: List Zillow coverage regions (US + Canada, all served via zillow.com).

Listing.description:
One Zillow search card (search / agent listings).

Merges the search `listResult` top-level with its richer
`hdpData.homeInfo` sub-object.

HomeFacts.description:
High-value subset of Zillow's `resoFacts` MLS block.

ponytail: resoFacts carries ~187 keys; these are the ones competitors
surface and callers actually query. Add more from resoFacts when a concrete
use-case demands it.

ListingSubType.description: `listingSubType` flags — the for-sale / foreclosure / auction taxonomy.

NearbyRegion.description: A linked nearby region (city / neighborhood / zip) on a property page.

Photo.description: A single listing photo with its responsive source variants.

ZestimateHistoryPoint.description: One point in the Zestimate value history series (`homeValueChartData`).

AgentReview.description: One review on a Zillow agent profile (from `reviewsData.reviews`).

PastSale.description: A closed transaction from an agent's `pastSales` block.

AutocompleteResult.description: A region/address suggestion resolved for a search term.

Pagination.description: Page-number pagination (Zillow search returns ~40 results per page).

MapBounds.description:
The map bounding box a search covers — callers tile with this to beat
Zillow's ~820-result (20-page) cap by subdividing dense boxes.
